notes: sw.js hardening. Adds explicit http(s) scheme guard to the fetch handler — kills 'Request scheme chrome-extension is unsupported' Cache API errors from browser extensions. Cache-bump forces PWA eviction so any device still running a pre-v1.6.26 sw.js (without the activate-handler cleanup that lands cache eviction) finally upgrades. The activate handler was already present from v1.5.0; no duplicate added.
